originalTitle: How AI threatens the giants of consulting
summary: The technology opens the door for smaller, well-funded challengers to take market share from the Big Four and others
content: The technology opens the door for smaller, well-funded challengers to take market share from the Big Four and others
chineseTitle: AI 如何威胁咨询巨头
chineseSummary: 该技术为规模较小、资金充足的挑战者从四大巨头和其他公司手中夺取市场份额打开了大门
chineseContent: 该技术为规模较小、资金充足的挑战者从四大巨头和其他公司手中夺取市场份额打开了大门
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
